items.title: Feature creation
items.description: Feature creation covers hand-designed columns from domain knowledge; feature extraction learns automatic mappings (vectorizers, encoders) from raw fields or text into numeric matrices.

items.title: Cleaning and transformation
items.description: Cleaning imputes missing values and rescales numeric columns; extraction sits after clean raw inputs exist—turning text or categorical raw fields into model-ready features before or alongside scaling steps in a Pipeline.

items.title: Multinomial Naive Bayes
items.description: Multinomial NB consumes non-negative count features produced by CountVectorizer; this topic owns the vectorizer and Pipeline fit/transform contract that NB tutorials depend on.

items.title: NumPy vectorization
items.description: NumPy vectorization speeds array operations you may implement manually; sklearn Transformers wrap similar logic with fit/transform state, sparse outputs, and Pipeline integration for ML workflows.

items.title: ColumnTransformer composition
items.description: ColumnTransformer applies different extractors per column and concatenates results— the tabular counterpart to chaining text vectorizers with numeric preprocessors in one estimators graph.
